sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64377" key="lwtofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λωτο-φόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n64377.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lotus-bearing</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λειμών</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:109" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">109</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
